steps.description: Click on the "Azure OpenAI" dropdown option to select the LLM service in the "Service for Large Language Model (LLM)" modal within Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code.
Type the text 'fake' into the "OpenAI Key" input field in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
Press 'Enter' to submit the entered AI Key in the authentication input box at the top of the Visual Studio Code window.
